page: Amazon Web Services r8i.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor with 8 vCPUs and 4 physical cores running at 3.9 GHz. The system is equipped with 64.0 GB of DDR5 memory operating at 7 GHz, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per physical core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps.

The x86_64 architecture CPU includes a large 480 MB L3 cache, 2 MB L2 cache, and 48 KB L1d cache. It supports advanced instruction sets including Intel Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX, AVX512) and Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX_tile, AMX_int8), which accelerate vector and matrix math operations. Cryptographic acceleration is supported via AES, VAES, and SHA_NI flags, alongside hardware-enforced Total Memory Encryption for security.

Benchmark data indicates strong single-core performance, with a Geekbench single-core score of 2111.0 and top-tier text processing performance at 2958.0. Single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression also register in the top 25% tier. Multi-core operations, such as Geekbench multi-core (8306.0) and Redis SET operations (15.16 million operations per second), perform in the average range. This hardware profile is suited for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, caching layers, and text processing tasks that benefit from high memory-to-vCPU ratios and DDR5 bandwidth.
description: Amazon Web Services r8i.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 8 vCPUs and 4 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor running at 3.9 GHz. Built on the Nitro hypervisor, it delivers 64.0 GB of high-speed DDR5 memory at 7 GHz, yielding an 8:1 memory-to-vCPU ratio. The instance lacks local storage and dedicated GPUs, utilizing a 4 Gbps baseline network interface. Its x86_64 CPU architecture features a 480 MB L3 cache and supports Intel AMX and AVX-512 extensions. Benchmarks show strong single-core capabilities, particularly in text processing and single-threaded compression, while multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics align with mid-range performance. This configuration is optimized for memory-intensive applications, database operations, and caching systems.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8i.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 8 vCPUs, 64 GB DDR5 RAM, and an Intel Xeon processor, designed for memory-intensive workloads and database operations.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services r8i.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 8 vCPUs, 64 GB of DDR5 RAM, and an Intel Xeon processor.
tagline: A memory-optimized instance featuring high-speed DDR5 memory, advanced Intel matrix extensions, and strong single-core processing for data-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 6975P-C processor with 8 vCPUs and 4 physical cores at 3.9 GHz
64.0 GB of high-speed DDR5 memory operating at 7 GHz
Intel AMX and AVX-512 extensions for accelerated matrix and vector math
Strong single-core performance in text processing and data compression
No local storage and 4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Suited for memory-intensive databases, caching layers, and text processing
